If Su.kta* (Venus) is conjoined with or has a combination
with Mercury (budha) and Moon (Chandra), she will be good
eloquacious, proficient, and will have easy grasping power. If
Sukra (Venus) is having Moon (Chandra)- Ketu combination,
she will be an expert in fine arts but will have illness -Asthama.
Ascendant (Lagna)
There are 12 ascendants. There would begain, Loss &
enemy combinations for all these 12 ascendants. It is not
possible to decide /ascertain whcih are the lasting I enduring,
profitable I advatageous and most superior I excelent ascendant.
for swearing in ceremony of Lod sri Rama, all sages including

FUNDAMENTAL OF RAO'S SYSTEM OF NADI ASlROLOGY I 03
Vasishta, Parashara have decided that it is an auspicious
ascendant. but, to the set time, swearing ceremony did not take
place. Lord Sri Rama started journey towards forest. If one
questions this, they say, the sages have decided that way. It is
a coincidence.
